title: Time-Blocking Idea
excerpt:
I would love to see a feature that notifies me and my team about an item associated with a date and time. 
For example, “Notify” “Person” on “Hour” on “Date”

posts.author: Chippy1934 (Joshua)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love to see a feature that notifies me and my team about an item associated with a date and time.

For example, “Notify” “Person” on “Hour” on “Date”
